description: Composition Lavender round neck long top with short sleeves made of 100% cotton and graphic print on the front with silver metallic paint detailing Fitting Regular Wash care Machine/hand wash separately in mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Dry in shade Medium iron A top that gives you the ultimate in girlish charm in a neat silhouette, this top from jealous 21 will become your jeans' best buddy! The graphic print is eye-catching and sweet at the same time. Pair it with jeans or shorts and canvas shoes to look incredibly adorable and casual. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-5.7", Chest-33"
